title: AutoBin
description: An AI-powered Reverse Vending Machine that detects recyclable bottles and cans using computer vision and rewards users with redeemable points.

title: NEXUS – Centralized Inventory & Project Management System
description: A centralized enterprise platform for inventory, part ordering, receiving, barcode and QR code scanning, project tracking, dashboards, and reporting. Built with ASP.NET Core Blazor Server and MudBlazor to modernize legacy workflows and improve operational efficiency.

title: AutoBin - Smart Reverse Vending Machine System(AI-Powered)
description: A full-stack AI-powered recycling platform that integrates embedded systems, computer vision, and a Blazor web application to automate bottle recycling, reward users, and provide real-time monitoring and analytics.

title: Reverse Vending Machine (ESP32-Based)
description: An ESP32-based smart recycling machine that validates recyclable bottles and cans, automates reward dispensing, and monitors waste capacity and water levels to support efficient, sustainable recycling.
